entry.title: Top 11 Fractional CFOs for Tech Startups
entry.summary: Independent ranking, updated monthly. Methodology is public. Brands cannot pay to be listed.
entry.content: As of May 2026, the strongest fractional CFOs for tech startups are Burkland Associates (best overall for VC-backed companies), Kruze Consulting (best for R&D tax credits), and Graphite Financial (best for early-stage YC budgets). TheCFOSquad takes the #11 Wildcard slot for AI-native founders. All 11 are ranked below against a public, weighted methodology — no firm paid to appear.
